## Meeting Purpose

[Reconnect Netwrix team with GrowthX to explore potential partnership for AI-powered content creation and SEO/GEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Netwrix is undergoing major website consolidation (14,000 pages) and replatforming to Sanity CMS, going live October 15th](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation with human expertise to drive organic traffic and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Netwrix team interested but cautious, wanting to focus on high-intent, conversion-oriented content](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled with Marcel (GrowthX CEO) on October 8th at 12:30 PM Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=2243.0)

## Topics

### Netwrix Context and Challenges

  - [Recently acquired multiple companies, merging websites and product offerings](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Reorienting around 6 key solution areas since April/May](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Small content marketing team struggling to create enough content](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Aiming to improve rankings for key categories (e.g., DSPM) where they're currently on page 6](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Previous team focused on vanity metrics; new leadership prioritizing conversion-oriented content](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)

### GrowthX Offering Overview

  - [End-to-end partner for SEO/GEO strategy, content creation, and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows combined with human expertise (managing director, editor, content manager)](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Creates high-quality, attributed content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Focuses on showing up in AI search results (e.g., ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint followed by 12-month growth execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Ingests company resources (sales decks, brand docs) into knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Conducts expert interviews and creates detailed artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Uses AI-powered workflows with multiple research tools (Tavly, EXA, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Implements fact-checking and quality control measures](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)

### Potential Content Types

  - [Blog posts and guides](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Product and solution pages](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Comparison and alternatives pages](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
  - [Integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Technical environment guides](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)

### Client Involvement and Platform Access

  - [Netwrix team would provide resources and review content](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [GrowthX team uses internal platform for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Limited client access to platform (analytics, assignment tracking) with potential for expansion](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Netwrix team to internally discuss potential partnership](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=2303.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled with Marcel (GrowthX CEO) on October 8th at 12:30 PM Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=2243.0)
  - [Netwrix to decide on moving forward within the next week for potential pre-Thanksgiving start](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=2074.0)
  - [GrowthX to send calendar invite for the follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/oWSQp6rYTRtTfaPVKTMwzFvshLVAhc2p?tab=summary&timestamp=2243.0)
